hero.name: Kevin Meneses
hero.headline: Turn your SaaS into technical content that attracts developers and generates customers
hero.tagline: I create SEO articles, code tutorials, YouTube videos, and content campaigns for AI, API, FinTech, and developer tool companies.
authority: +$20,000 generated for a client through content

pitch.headline: Most SaaS companies have a great product, but very few developers understand why they should use it.
pitch.body: I create technical content grounded in real problems, working code, and use cases that build trust and accelerate adoption.

offerings.title: What I can do for your company

categories.title: Technical SEO Content
categories.benefit: Content that ranks on Google and educates at the same time, so developers find you when they're searching for a solution.
items: Use cases with AI, Python, and automation

categories.title: Developer Marketing
categories.benefit: Distribution where your technical audience already is, to build authority beyond your own blog.

categories.title: YouTube & Product Demos
categories.benefit: Video content that shows your product actually working — the fastest way to build technical trust.

videos.title: I also create videos
videos.body: Alongside articles, I record technical videos on YouTube with hands-on demos and real use cases.

contentPackages.title: Content Packages
contentPackages.subtitle: A quick way to understand the scope of each collaboration — the final proposal is always tailored to your case.

items.name: Starter
items.description: Ideal for companies that want to validate a technical content strategy.
features: 1 YouTube video with a hands-on demo

items.name: Growth
items.description: Built to generate authority and steadily grow visibility.
features: Promotion on Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to, and other channels

items.name: Authority
items.description: The most complete option for companies that want to become a reference in their space.

process.title: My process

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: I get to know your product, your technical audience, and what sets you apart from the competition.

steps.title: Research
steps.description: I research what your audience is actually looking for and spot the content gaps you can own.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: I build the article, tutorial, or video, testing the code and the solution end to end.

steps.title: Distribution
steps.description: I publish and repurpose the content across the channels your technical audience already uses.

process.closing: The result is content that educates, positions your brand as a reference, and keeps driving traffic months after publishing.

whyMe.title: Why work with me?
whyMe.intro: I combine three pillars that rarely come together in one person:

profiles.title: Developer
profiles.description: Able to build real examples and explain complex concepts simply.

profiles.title: Tech consultant
profiles.description: Experienced in CRM, automation, AI, and enterprise software.

profiles.title: Own distribution
profiles.description: An established audience on YouTube, Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to, and GitHub — your content doesn't depend only on your own blog.

whyMe.closing: That lets me create content that's not only technically accurate, but also engaging, easy to consume, and results-driven.

caseStudyMain.title: How I helped EODHD turn technical traffic into customers
caseStudyMain.problem: EODHD has a solid financial data API, but many developers didn't understand why they should choose it over other market data sources.
caseStudyMain.solution: Technical articles and tutorials with real code showing the API solving concrete problems — from LangChain AI agents to automated technical analysis.
caseStudyMain.contentType: SEO technical articles, code tutorials, and demo videos.
caseStudyMain.quote: Kevin's content doesn't stay surface-level — he understands the API, tests the examples, and explains exactly why a developer should use EODHD. His work helped us convert organic traffic better.
caseStudyMain.name: Nick
caseStudyMain.statLabel: in revenue generated through organic content

items.problem: They needed to reach more developers and give visibility to their document processing SDK against better-known alternatives.
items.solution: Practical technical content showing real SDK integrations across different languages and use cases.

items.problem: The product was solid, but few developers knew how to start using it in a real project.
items.solution: Step-by-step tutorials focused on the first integration, to reduce adoption friction.

items.problem: They wanted to drive product adoption among a technical and investor audience, without sounding like generic marketing.
items.solution: Content that explains the product through the real use case, with data and practical examples.
items.contentType: Articles and use cases backed by real data.

talk.title: Let's talk
talk.body: If you're building an API, an AI platform, a SaaS product, or a developer tool and want to grow your visibility with high-quality technical content, I'd love to help.
talk.closing: Let's create content developers actually want to read, watch, and share.
